title: Recognize fractions
description: Identify the fraction of a whole that is shaded.  Fractions are less than 1.

assessment_items.question_content:
The following circle is equal to one whole.


[[☃ image 1]]

**What fraction of the circle is shaded?**



[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
There are $\maroonD6$ equal parts.


[[☃ image 1]]

Each slice is equal to $\blueD1$ out of $\maroonD6$ pieces, or ${\dfrac{\blueD1}\maroonD{6}}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

The shaded amount is equal to ${\dfrac{\blueD2}\maroonD{6}} $.There are $\blueD{2}$ out of $\maroonD6$ slices shaded, or ${\dfrac{\blueD2}\maroonD{6}}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: A circle divided into six equal parts with two parts shaded.

assessment_items.question_content:
The following circle is equal to one whole.

 [[☃ image 1]]

**What fraction of the circle is shaded?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]

There are $\blueD{2}$ out of $\maroonD3$ slices shaded, or ${\dfrac{\blueD2}\maroonD{3}}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

The shaded amount is equal to ${\dfrac{\blueD2}\maroonD{3}} $.

options.alt: A circle divided into three equal parts with two parts shaded.

assessment_items.question_content:
The following circle is equal to one whole.

[[☃ image 1]]

**What fraction of the circle is shaded?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
There are $\maroonD2$ equal parts.


[[☃ image 1]]

Each slice is equal to $\blueD1$ out of $\maroonD2$ pieces, or $\blueD1\maroonD{\text{ half}}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

There is $\blueD{1}$ out of $\maroonD2$ slices shaded, or $\blueD1\maroonD{\text{ half}}$.


[[☃ image 1]]
The shaded amount is equal to $\blueD1\maroonD{\text{ half}}$.

options.alt: A circle divided into two equal parts with left part shaded.

choices.content: $1$ half
$1$ one
$2$ halves
$2$ ones

assessment_items.question_content:
Each circle is equal to one whole.

**Which images show $\dfrac13$ shaded?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Each whole is divided into $\maroonD3$ equal parts.

[[☃ image 1]]

Each slice is equal to $\blueD1$ out of $\maroonD3$ pieces, or ${\dfrac{\blueD1}\maroonD{3}}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

We want the fraction shaded to be $\dfrac{\blueD{1}}{\maroonD3}$, so we need to find images with $\blueD1$ out of $\maroonD3$ pieces shaded.


[[☃ image 1]]

The following images show $\dfrac13$ shaded:


[[☃ image 1]]


[[☃ image 2]]
